author.name: Deep Value Investing
author.description: Value Investor, Stocks Analyst, Deep Company Research, Student of the game

tweet.text:
The China thesis is still playing out. 

$XPEV – EVs (smart electric vehicles, autonomous tech focus) 

$NIO – EVs (premium smart EVs + battery swapping ecosystem) 

$BABA – E-commerce/cloud/tech ecosystem (marketplaces, cloud computing, logistics) 

$JD – E-commerce (direct retail + logistics / supply chain)

Just look at their financials:

Net Incomes -> Increasing

Gross Profit -> Increasing

Total Revenue -> Increasing

Yet their shares are all down due to China FUD.

It's time to send them all higher.
